entries.title: convert lead and verify conversion details

params.data: [2026-04-20T05:09:31.044Z] [INFO] Fresh browser detected login screen. Logging in with configured credentials.
[2026-04-20T05:09:31.044Z] [STEP] Wait for login fields to be visible
[2026-04-20T05:09:32.520Z] [STEP] Wait for Salesforce home after login/OTP
[2026-04-20T05:09:35.725Z] [STEP] Verify homepage is loaded with m360Care branding
[2026-04-20T05:09:35.973Z] [STEP] Verify m360Care branding text is visible
[2026-04-20T05:09:36.173Z] [PASS] Homepage is loaded and m360Care branding is visible
[2026-04-20T05:09:36.698Z] [STEP] Select leads list view: Today's Leads

step.title: Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: /Select a List View/i })
Click getByRole('button', { name: /Select a List View/i })
Scroll into view getByRole('option', { name: 'Today\'s Leads' }).first()

params.data: [2026-04-20T05:09:39.850Z] [PASS] Leads list view selected: Today's Leads
[2026-04-20T05:09:42.851Z] [STEP] Open lead record by email: john.doe750@example.com
[2026-04-20T05:09:52.449Z] [PASS] Lead created successfully - record is present in list

step.title: Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'john.doe750@example.com' }).first().locator('th a, a').first()
Click locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'john.doe750@example.com' }).first().locator('th a, a').first()

params.data: [2026-04-20T05:09:52.612Z] [PASS] Lead record opened using email match
[2026-04-20T05:09:52.612Z] [STEP] Click Convert button on lead record

[2026-04-20T05:09:55.183Z] [STEP] Click Convert and verify conversion success

step.title: Expect "toBeVisible" locator('section[role=\'dialog\'], .slds-modal').last().getByRole('heading', { name: /Your lead has been converted/i })

Scroll into view getByRole('option', { name: 'Today\'s Leads' }).first()
